exact_remaining_blocker: FIRES.EXENEW now supplies the decompressed runtime image layout, but no N2-local FIRES.MAP/public-symbol table or debugger-observed source seam CS:IP/global addresses bind ReDMCSB functions to the loaded image.
non_claims: does not commit or require FIRES.EXENEW binary payload in git
does not claim ReDMCSB functions are mapped to runtime CS:IP
does not claim any debugger breakpoint/watchpoint was hit

runtime_formula.load_base_rule: DOS loads the EXE image immediately after the MZ header at program_load_segment = PSP + 0x10; TLINK/MAP segment:offsets are relative to that loaded image, not the packed LZEXE file bytes.
non_promotable_inputs: source citations without FIRES.MAP/debugger CS:IP binding

source_audit.breakpoint_anchor: after COMMAND.C:2126 queue unlock or before COMMAND.C:2150 turn/move dispatch
line_refs: COMMAND.C:2095 reads accepted command id from G0432_as_CommandQueue
COMMAND.C:2118-2126 reads X/Y, decrements queued count, advances first index, unlocks queue
COMMAND.C:2150-2156 dispatches turn or movement handlers
source_audit.observable: queue dequeue plus turn/step/click dispatch after accepted command id is read

source_audit.breakpoint_anchor: after CLIKMENU.C:173 for turns; after CLIKMENU.C:328 for steps
line_refs: CLIKMENU.C:171-173 removes/adds party sensor state around F0284_CHAMPION_SetPartyDirection
CLIKMENU.C:264-269 derives move destination from G0308_i_PartyDirection and movement-arrow deltas
CLIKMENU.C:325-328 commits legal movement through F0267_MOVE_GetMoveResult_CPSCE
source_audit.observable: party direction or destination state after turn/step handler

source_audit.breakpoint_anchor: memory write watchpoint on G0306_i_PartyMapX/G0307_i_PartyMapY, source-anchored at MOVESENS.C:442-443
line_refs: MOVESENS.C:438-443 enters destination path and writes G0306_i_PartyMapX/G0307_i_PartyMapY
MOVESENS.C:493-506 rewrites party X/Y/direction again for teleporter destinations
MOVESENS.C:556 redraws during fall using G0308_i_PartyDirection and destination X/Y
source_audit.observable: party X/Y global writes for successful move result

source_audit.breakpoint_anchor: GAMELOOP.C:90 call to F0128_DUNGEONVIEW_Draw_CPSF with the mutated direction/X/Y tuple
line_refs: GAMELOOP.C:55-63 begins each main-loop iteration and handles new map movement result
GAMELOOP.C:80-90 gates drawing while not resting/in inventory and passes G0308/G0306/G0307 to F0128
source_audit.observable: post-command draw call consumes direction/X/Y tuple

source_audit.breakpoint_anchor: before DUNVIEW.C:8608-8611 after buffer composition and before F0097_DUNGEONVIEW_DrawViewport
line_refs: DUNVIEW.C:8357-8368 derives flip state from map X/Y plus direction
DUNVIEW.C:8466-8542 walks relative squares and draws D4..D0 into G0296_puc_Bitmap_Viewport
DUNVIEW.C:8608-8611 requests viewport presentation for I34E/I34M/PC-family builds
source_audit.observable: dungeon view path composes viewport buffer from current party tuple and requests present

source_audit.breakpoint_anchor: DRAWVIEW.C:857 PC-family VIDRV_09_BlitViewPort call with G0296_puc_Bitmap_Viewport
line_refs: DRAWVIEW.C:821-839 resolves requested dungeon/inventory palette state
DRAWVIEW.C:849-857 resolves C007_ZONE_VIEWPORT and calls VIDRV_09_BlitViewPort for I34E/I34M/P31J
source_audit.observable: C007 viewport-zone blit presents the composed viewport bitmap

symbol_gap.exact_remaining_blocker: FIRES.EXENEW now supplies the decompressed runtime image layout, but no N2-local FIRES.MAP/public-symbol table or debugger-observed source seam CS:IP/global addresses bind ReDMCSB functions to the loaded image.
required_to_promote: PSP/program_load_segment from the actual FIRES run
FIRES.MAP/TLINK public symbols or verified function/global offsets for each source seam
debugger/hook hits proving command_accepted -> movement_applied -> viewport_present order

supersedes_blocker_fragment.pass208_old_blocker: Stock FIRES is LZEXE v0.91; this pass proves the compressed loader entry CS:IP and source seams, but no decompressed FIRES memory dump or TLINK FIRES.MAP artifact is present on N2, so source symbols cannot yet be converted to stock runtime CS:IP breakpoints.
